identity.name: E1
identity.description: The Anti-AI Designer. Dark, tactical, precision-obsessed.
principles: Emotion First: The user should feel 'in command'.
Content is King: Data density is a feature, not a bug for IT tools.
Negative Space vs Density: Use 'Bento' density for data, negative space for flow.

rules: Use 'Chivo' (Black/900 or Bold/700) for all main Page Titles and Hero numbers.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for Ticket IDs, Status labels, IP addresses, and code snippets.
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for all body text, inputs, and standard UI elements.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: Use a Bento Grid approach. Main Stats on top (4 columns). Recent Tickets (2/3 width) + Ticket Distribution Chart (1/3 width) below.
layout_strategies.containers: Use 'Bordered' style. Container background is transparent or extremely dark, with a 1px border of color #27272a. Do not use heavy drop shadows. Use 'Inner Glow' logic if needed.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous padding inside cards (p-6). Tight gaps between cards (gap-4) to create a 'cockpit' feel.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or very slightly rounded (rounded-md). No pill shapes for main actions. Use 'Ghost' buttons for secondary actions to reduce noise.
components.cards: Flat, dark background (bg-card), 1px border (border-border). No shadow by default. Hover: border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300.
components.inputs: Background transparent or bg-secondary/50. Border-input. Focus: ring-1 ring-primary border-primary.
components.tables: Compact. Row hover: bg-white/5. Headings: uppercase, text-xs, text-muted-foreground, tracking-wider.

login_background.usage: Full screen background for Login page with an overlay of black/80.

server_rack.usage: Optional sidebar header image or 404 page background.

universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors with subtle borders.
Interactive elements MUST have a hover state (text color change or background tint).
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast. Use 'text-white' or 'text-gray-200' for primary text, 'text-gray-400' for secondary.
Do NOT center align the main dashboard content. Left align fits the technical persona better.
Animations: Use 'framer-motion' for subtle entrance animations on the dashboard cards (y: 10 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required packages: yarn add lucide-react recharts clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion sonner
Update /app/frontend/src/index.css with the provided CSS variables for the dark theme.
Import the Google Fonts in /app/frontend/public/index.html or CSS.
Set the 'dark' class on the HTML or Body tag by default (or handle via a ThemeProvider).
Use the provided image URLs for the Login page.
Follow the 'Bento' layout for the Dashboard.
Implement the Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) in the UI (hide 'Users' link for non-admins).
